Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory00.png'}
{1: 'There is only one true heroism in the world: to see the world as it is, and to love it.', 2: '000000ff', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory00.png', 6: '1', 7: '-3', 10: '1'}
{1: ' —Romain Rolland', 2: '000000ff', 3: '0.5', 4: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory00.png', 6: '1', 7: '-1', 9: '1', 10: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1373.jpg'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiRainNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'Elysium, a cold steel jungle. A city of near-perpetual night.'}
{3: 'High above the bustling streets, a virtual model beams from a massive holographic billboard, her tireless smile hovering as her high heels seemingly stride through the dense crowds below.'}
{3: 'Neon lights from countless billboards twist through a haze of smoke and steam, painting the skyscraper facades in electric color.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1373.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1373.jpg'}
{3: 'Then, the night rain arrives right on schedule, like an old friend tasked with blurring the smog into a streaky watercolor.'}
{1: 'RImgBg1DisableSlow'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1372.jpg'}
{3: 'From her usual high vantage point, the purple-haired woman gazes down at the metropolis. A line from an old novel surfaces in her mind—'}
{3: '"The sky above the port was the color of television, tuned to a dead channel."'}
{3: 'She glances toward the distant harbor, where pinpoints of light struggle to pierce the oppressive gloom.'}
{3: 'In her earpiece, the police channel buzzes with relentless dispatch codes.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 4: '4'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiLivWarmActivity/FxUiLivWarmActivityVinylBo01.prefab', 2: '2'}
{2: 'Dispatcher', 3: 'Incident 2077. We have a call about anomalous sounds in Apartment 703 at 442 Arclight Avenue. Sector 94, respond and investigate.'}
{2: '12A94', 3: '12A94 copies. En route to 2077.'}
{2: 'Dispatcher', 3: 'All units, stand by. 12A94 is responding to Incident 2077.'}
{2: '12A94', 3: '12A94 on scene at apartment 703. Knocked. No answer.'}
{2: '12A94', 3: 'I\'ve got visual on blood under the door! Requesting emergency entry.'}
{2: 'Dispatcher', 3: 'Copy that. Please upload photos and video footage of the scene.'}
{2: '12A94', 3: 'This is 12A94, cleared for entry. Breaching now.'}
{2: 'Dispatcher', 3: '12A94, acknowledge. What\'s the status on Incident 2077?'}
{2: 'Dispatcher', 3: '12A94, Code 1. Do you copy?'}
{2: '12A94', 3: '12A94 copies, Code 2-H. Confirming one civilian casualty. I repeat, one civilian casualty.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiLivWarmActivity/FxUiLivWarmActivityVinylBo01.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront43.png', 4: '4', 5: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: '???', 3: 'This is ED03, "The Unwinged". Intel received. I am inbound. 12A94, lock down the perimeter. Do not contaminate the scene.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'A moment of silence falls over the radio channel.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1365.jpg'}
{3: 'Patrol officer Johnny huddles under the scant shelter of a dripping eave, waiting for the visitor\'s arrival.'}

{1: '1', 3: 'Moments later, an anti-grav car that belongs to the Department of Public Safety descends before 442 Arclight Avenue. The door slides open, and a black umbrella unfurls against the curtain of rain as "The Unwinged" steps up.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Johnny meets the lavender-haired woman on the pavement, the rain immediately plastering his hair to his forehead.'}
{2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'Hello, I\'m patrol officer Johnny from the 12th Patrol Division...', 4: '2'}
{3: 'The patter of rain and the relentless drone of the nearby billboards swallow his words, blurring his form into the neon-smeared backdrop.'}
{2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'Ahem... unit designation 12A94. My partner\'s upstairs securing the scene.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'He raises his voice.'}
{2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'Honestly, it\'s a real relief you\'re here, Inspector...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Moineau.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Her tone is a flat, polished stone, leaving no room for the pleasantries he was attempting.'}
{2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'Right... This way, Inspector Moineau.', 4: '2'}
{3: 'Any urge for small talk he might have had is now gone.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiRainNew.prefab'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1369.jpg'}
{3: '"Ding, ding, ding... Ding!"'}

{3: 'The elevator shudders to a halt on the seventh floor. Likely to keep residents in good spirits, the management had installed these relentlessly cheerful cartoon jingles—a stark, almost cruel contrast to the scene awaiting them.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory420.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory420.png'}
{3: 'Moineau steps out, her eyes immediately tracking the door numbers down the hall.'}
{3: 'The numbers are running backward.'}
{3: 'She pivots, heading toward 703.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Give me the sitrep.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'The caller is Allen Blake, male, 42, lives alone in 704. Said he called us after hearing some unusual noises from next door.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'What time did he hear them?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'Uh...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Sigh. When was the call logged?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'Let me check... It was 8:12 PM.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Your ATA?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'Um... we were on scene by 8:18.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'Time of death?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'He fumbles, wringing his hands.'}
{2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'With all due respect, ma\'am, we\'re patrol. We don\'t have the training for that...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'Best guess is, it was very recent.', 4: '2'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1370.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1370.jpg'}
{3: 'His face contorts, a mask of fresh discomfort.'}
{2: 'Moineau', 3: 'What is it?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: 'The victim\'s name is... Christina. She\'s a Construct.', 4: '2'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory650.jpg', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory650.jpg'}
{3: 'Moineau\'s scanning gaze halts at 703. It passes over the flickering yellow holographic tape and locks onto the floor inside the open doorway.'}
{1: '999', 2: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStoryFront/BgStoryFront17.png', 3: '0', 4: '1', 5: '0.5'}
{1: '1', 3: 'A pool of deep, glistening vital fluid soaks through pink synthetic hair. The young girl, Christina, lies broken and motionless.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'You\'ve got to be kidding me...', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory1373.jpg'}
{3: 'The night rain bleeds neon through the haze, swallowing the city whole.'}
{1: 'RImgBg1DisableSlow'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory650.jpg'}
{3: 'Inside Apartment 703 at 442 Arclight Avenue, the forensic investigator snaps off her gloves.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Forensic Investigator', 3: 'Time of examination, 9:03 PM. Estimated time of death is between 7:20 PM and 7:50 PM.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Forensic Investigator', 3: 'The victim...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'The forensic investigator looks up. Moineau, the department\'s star agent, stands with her arms crossed, her attention clearly elsewhere as she checks the time on her terminal.'}
{3: 'She hasn\'t heard a word.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Forensic Investigator', 3: 'Sigh...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'She understands the distraction. In fact, every officer at the scene is watching Moineau, their attention taut. They all know who Moineau\'s partner is.'}
{3: 'A soft commotion echoes from the hallway—murmurs of surprise, the sound of officers greeting someone.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Patrol Officer Johnny', 3: '...Inspector... right this way.', 4: '18'}
{3: 'Every officer holds their breath, their attention fixed on the doorway where Moineau\'s partner—and the victim\'s spectral double in hair color—is about to appear.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'At the sound of approaching footsteps, Moineau steps forward.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moineau', 3: 'I wasn\'t aware you had another "sister."', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Sightline Breach', 2: 'Chapter 38', 3: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Atlas/CommonLogo/BgLogo1.png'}
{1: 'ThemeEnable'}
{1: 'DialogDisable'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory833.jpg'}
{1: 'Inside the Sewer', 2: 'Elysium', 4: 'Dock'}
{2: 'Sewers beneath Elysium\'s docks.'}
{3: 'This is the city\'s lower intestine, a world away from the gleaming lights and glass facades above. Here, the only spectacle is the murky effluent of urban waste.'}
{3: 'Rust, decay, and things better left unnamed stew together in a witch\'s cauldron, brewing a stench that doesn\'t just assault the nostrils, but seeps into the soul.'}
{3: 'Squelch.'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Oh no... Elean\'s going to kill me...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Okay, don\'t panic. A bouquet and a home-cooked meal. That\'s the price for ruining her floor. She\'ll forgive me.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Right. Mission first. Focus, Moore.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Inspector Moore of the Crime Investigation Bureau dismisses the unidentified filth beneath his shoe, his attention already returning to the scene.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moore', 3: 'The sewer system under the docks is such a maze. So this is where our tax money is really going.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'It\'s easy to get turned around down here, even for me. A regular person wouldn\'t stand a chance.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'Jack, oh Jack... what were you thinking, coming to a place like this?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The missing person case flashes back into Moore\'s mind. He tightens his jaw and hardens his gaze.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory182.png'}

{3: 'Moore has been working on the case of a man named Jack, missing for over 48 hours. A painstaking review of surveillance footage traced Jack\'s last known movements to the docks, where the trail went cold again.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moore', 3: 'Hey, have any of you seen this man? 34, brown hair, about 5 feet 8, and around 155 pounds.', 4: '18'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Dock Worker A', 3: 'Nope. Don\'t know him.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Dock Worker B', 3: 'Probably jumped into the drink. Folks are fragile these days. One bad day, and they give up.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Dock Worker C', 3: 'Hold on... I might\'ve seen \'im.', 4: '3'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moore', 3: 'Really? Tell me what you saw.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Dock Worker C', 3: 'Yesterday, during dinner, I saw a guy in the distance. Looked like he was huntin\' for somethin\'. Pretty sure he ducked into the sewer access over there.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Dock Worker C', 3: 'Can\'t swear it was your guy, though. Only saw his back.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Dock Worker C', 3: 'But...', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'But what? If you know something, tell me.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Dock Worker C', 3: 'Well, it\'s not really a lead, but there\'s been some weird noises comin\' from down there lately.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Moore', 3: 'What kind of noises?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Dock Worker C', 3: 'Like machinery. A few of the guys say they\'ve seen weird-lookin\' mechanoids skulkin\' around, ones with a red glow.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Dock Worker C', 3: 'My guess? It\'s just some company testin\' new gear. Seein\' how it holds up in the muck.', 4: '3'}
{3: 'After interviewing the dock workers, Moore entered the sewers to begin his search.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '3'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/BgStory833.jpg'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Moore', 3: 'There you are.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Moore crouches, his eyes cutting through the filth until they lock onto a single, clear footprint.'}
{3: 'He follows the trail of scattered impressions, his own form swallowed by the oppressive gloom of the sewers.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStory/FxUiStoryBlackPassScene.prefab', 2: '3'}
{3: 'Click. Clack.'}
{3: 'He quickly drops into a low crouch, his footsteps going silent. He presses against the damp wall, carefully leaning to peer around a corner.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'There, he sees them. The "mechanoids" the dock worker mentioned.'}
{1: '1', 3: 'And beside them, Jack, sprawled motionless on the ground, long past his last breath.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryWhiteNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: 'RImgBg1Shake'}
{3: 'Then, in the darkness, a dozen visual sensors bloom with malevolent red light, all turning toward him in unison.'}
